---
title: "IMRF Overview"
subtitle: "UIC Advanced Investment Management"
author: "John W. Pearce, CFA"
date: 2023-02-16
categories: [UIC, Guest Lecture]
---

I spoke with my colleages at John Wightkin's Advanced Investment Management course on February 16, 2023.

# Agenda

I.  Background and Asset Owner Landscape
II. Quantitative Investing Primer
III. Trading
IV. Looking Ahead

# Resources

![Title Slide Image](titleslide.png)
